race.comment: Tough. TEWKESBURY (2) steps up to the staying trip seeking the hat-trick. He's been finishing hard over middle distances and the 1.5kg is handy. He'll go close with average luck in running. WILL IT SNOW (3) has won two of his last three, with the latest over 1800m on a heavy track at the Gold Coast. Races forward and despite the steep rise in trip deserves plenty of consideration. VERMILION KIRIN (5) comes back a bit in grade and is knocking on the door. Wasn't beaten far over 1800m at the Gold Coast last time and ran a solid race at Doomben prior over 2240m. Likes to position on pace and is sure to give a big sight. PAPAL MISS (10) has an ordinary form line but has won over this trip and has some weight relief on a quick backup. Can go better here.
